nodes.goal: Load Niterói OSM, spatially join buildings to roads within 100 m, compute average nearby building height per road via GPU, render thematic map linked to brushable scatter.

dataflow.name: Autark spatial join + regression
dataflow.description: Grammar-native spatial join (roads × buildings, 100 m NEAR) + GPU compute + linked scatter: road lane count vs average height of nearby buildings in Niterói.
